prompt: Apply Anthropic brand colors and typography to this HTML landing page so it matches the official look-and-feel.
expected: Restyles the HTML to use Anthropic palette (#141413, #faf9f5, #d97757, #6a9bcc, #788c5d), Poppins headings, and Lora body text while preserving layout and readability.

prompt: Format this presentation outline to follow Anthropic's corporate brand guidelines.
expected: Applies Anthropic color scheme and typography hierarchy to the document/presentation, using accent colors for non-text shapes and ensuring on-brand visual formatting.

prompt: Design a polished one-page brand guideline showcase for a new internal tool that feels unmistakably Anthropic, but I haven't decided on the exact content structure yet.
expected: Creates a cohesive artifact (HTML/doc/poster) using Anthropic brand colors, fonts, and spacing, with a restrained, professional composition even with ambiguous requirements.
